title: memecylon capitellatum
intro: Memecylon capitellatum is a plant species that belongs to the family Melastomataceae, native to Sri Lanka. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic activities. The health benefits of Memecylon capitellatum include treating various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from digestive problems and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Memecylon capitellatum can be made into decoctions or infusions, and it is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
